news.title:
Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.
Weightage increases in Yes Bank, Kotak Bank; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank face outflows. Nifty Next 50 sees major reshuffle.

Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.

news.title:
India VIX dropped to 24.5, signaling reduced market anxiety; Nifty 50 rose 2.3% to 23,444.75, and Sensex gained 2.2%.
Softened crude oil prices eased inflation concerns; HDFC Bank, Reliance, Bharti Airtel led Nifty 50 gains, with midcaps outperforming.
news.summary:
India VIX dropped to 24.5, signaling reduced market anxiety; Nifty 50 rose 2.3% to 23,444.75, and Sensex gained 2.2%.
Softened crude oil prices eased inflation concerns; HDFC Bank, Reliance, Bharti Airtel led Nifty 50 gains, with midcaps outperforming.

news.title:
6.12 Cr shares of HDFC Bank traded on Tuesday, marking high volume.
The trading volume was the highest in the last 6 sessions.

news.title:
HDFC Bank appoints Wadia Ghandy, Trilegal, and a US firm to review ex-chairman Atanu Chakraborty's abrupt resignation.
The review includes board meetings, whistleblower complaints, and ethical concerns; findings to be submitted soon.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank appoints Wadia Ghandy, Trilegal, and a US firm to review ex-chairman Atanu Chakraborty's abrupt resignation.
The review includes board meetings, whistleblower complaints, and ethical concerns; findings to be submitted soon.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, L&T, and Fino Payments led Tuesday's market movers with significant action.
Indian indices rose sharply, driven by gains in banks, auto, and IT sectors.

news.title:
Nomura warns Indian banks' margins to face pressure as deposit growth lags credit growth, impacting profitability and NIM recovery.
Nomura highlights ICICI, Axis as top picks; maintains 'Buy' on HDFC, Kotak, SBI, and others with revised target prices cut by 2-24%.

news.title:
SEBI Chair Pandey highlights governance norms in HDFC Bank case, emphasizing transparency and formal processes amid Chairman Chakraborty's resignation.
Pandey confirms no changes in SEBI's approach to F&O trading, with measures like tighter limits and monitoring in place, awaiting further data analysis.
news.summary:
